artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located a German university research policy for generative AI, the Rechenzentrum Open WebUI service page, and University Library study guidance. Firecrawl was unavailable with HTTP 402, so final evidence snapshots came from direct HTTP fetches on robots-allowed public official pages.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Open WebUI ist eine webbasierte Oberfläche, mit der alle Mitglieder der Universität Freiburg Large Language Models (LLMs) sicher und unkompliziert in Verwaltung, Studium, Lehre und Forschung einsetzen können.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Alle Daten bleiben bei Verwendung der internen Modelle innerhalb der gesicherten Uni-Umgebung. Bei der Nutzung externer Modelle werden Ihre Anfragen über den zentralen API Zugang der Universität an die Anbieter weitergeleitet.

artifacts.title: Albert-Ludwigs-Universitaet Freiburg AI Policy Evidence Draft
artifacts.summary: Draft staged evidence package for Albert-Ludwigs-Universitaet Freiburg based on official University of Freiburg research policy, Rechenzentrum Open WebUI guidance, and University Library study guidance. Claims remain OpenClaw staged candidates and are not canonical public facts.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The intranet AI tools page requires UniAccount access and was not used as evidence.
Faculty-only and news-only sources were rejected to avoid overbroad university-wide claims.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
